description_long: This is an above-ground, octagonal jacuzzi with a wooden exterior paneling and a blue water interior. The jacuzzi features a set of wooden steps attached to one side, providing easy access to the water. A metal ladder is visible inside the jacuzzi, positioned opposite the steps for additional entry or exit. On one side, there is a visible external filtration or pump unit, colored orange and black, connected to the jacuzzi. The water inside appears clean and nearly fills the tub, with the waterline close to the top edge. The overall design is robust and suitable for outdoor placement in urban gardens, patios, or recreational areas.
description: An octagonal, above-ground wooden jacuzzi with blue water, wooden steps, a metal ladder, and an external pump unit. The water is nearly full and the design is sturdy and inviting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden steps leading up to the jacuzzi and the blue water inside.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the jacuzzi, the steps, and the external pump unit attached to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the external pump unit and the metal ladder inside the jacuzzi.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the metal ladder and the pump unit on the left, with no steps visible.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water level close to the top edge
